name: Vetzyme Cod Liver Oil 150ml
shortDescription: This is a veterinary formulation optimized for the health of your pet. Cod liver oil helps maintain a healthy coat, bright eyes, firm bones and strong teeth.
description: Feeding vet-zyme cod liver oil at the recommended rate every day will supply a balanced level of natural vitamin A and D needed to maintain good health and condition. Cod liver oil helps maintain a healthy coat, bright eyes, firm bones and strong teeth. It is rich in polyunsaturated fats which supplies concentrated energy and maintain a supple skin and glossy coat. Mix the following amounts daily with food or feed directly from a spoon. DOGS Puppies: At the start of weaning a few drops increasing gradually to a 5Ml teaspoon per 500g (1lb) of food. Adults: Small breeds- up to 5kg (approx 10lb) half to one 5Ml teaspoon. Large Breeds: One 5ml teaspoon. CATS Kittens: At the start of weaning a few drops increasing gradually up to half to one 5Ml teaspoon. Adults: One 5ml teaspoon. DO NOT EXCEED DAILY RECOMMENDATIONS
